description: A continuous orchestrator must not delete its heartbeat and wait for push/dispatch confirmation after accepted tasks are cleaned and main is ahead.

files.docs/reviews/local-push-confirmation-sto: 已确认当前没有 active worker：两条任务都已 cleaned，worktree/branch 已清理；main 仍是 origin/main [ahead 4]。因为当前下一步需要你确认是否 push / 是否继续派下一批，我已删除这个 heartbeat，避免每 10 分钟重复提醒。
